reviewer_concern: Results were reported mainly as point estimates.
response_claim: We added bootstrap 95% confidence intervals for ROC-AUC, PR-AUC, balanced accuracy, sensitivity, specificity, F1, and MCC.
safe_language: The revised analysis reports uncertainty ranges rather than relying only on point estimates.

response_claim: We added paired bootstrap comparisons between the learned SACU fusion, GradientBoosting baseline, fusion variants, and individual organizational agents.
safe_language: The learned SACU fusion was statistically higher than weaker agents, while its ROC-AUC difference from GradientBoosting was not statistically significant.

response_claim: We added a clinical operating-point analysis comparing default, Youden, high-sensitivity, and high-specificity thresholds.
safe_language: Threshold optimization improved balanced operating behavior without changing the trained model.

reviewer_concern: The contribution of organizational roles was insufficiently demonstrated.
response_claim: We added individual-agent performance, leave-one-agent-out ablation, and role contribution loss analyses.
safe_language: Bilateral and local-regional roles showed the clearest positive marginal signal; we avoid claiming that every role independently improves performance.

reviewer_concern: Claims of superiority were too strong.
response_claim: We revised the interpretation to distinguish discrimination, balanced operating behavior, and statistical significance.
safe_language: The revised manuscript no longer claims universal state-of-the-art superiority.
